description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe featuring a dynamic design with a combination of black, orange, and gray colors. The upper is constructed from a textured black material with orange overlays, giving it a striking, sporty appearance. The toe and parts of the upper are adorned with a glossy, tortoiseshell-like orange pattern, while the midsole and heel are a smooth, matte gray. The shoe has a slip-on style with prominent pull tabs at both the tongue and heel, and lacks traditional laces. The sole appears thick and cushioned, designed for comfort and support during urban activities. The overall build suggests durability and style suitable for city environments.
description: A modern, slip-on athletic shoe with a black and orange upper, glossy accents, and a thick gray sole. It features pull tabs and a bold, urban-inspired design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black textured upper, orange glossy overlays, and the full gray sole with a visible pull tab at the heel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel pull tab, the rounded gray heel counter, and the orange trim along the collar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same black and orange pattern, with the gray sole and both pull tabs visible.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the glossy orange toe cap, the slip-on tongue with a pull tab, and the absence of laces.
